Question: What is the thinnest conductor core diameter (in millimeters) among these exact configurations: ItemIndex = "IDX-LT-2026-002 limited-edition run with reinforced ferrules" with ProductNomen = "Arcade Studio Run — reinforced sleeve for touring rigs", TerminationSpec = "2-pin MMCX with micro-sleeve reinforcement and soldered litz tails", and ShieldingArchitecture = "Sparse braid with low-mass foil liner optimized for ultra-low capacitance and controlled impedance"; ItemIndex = "IDX-LT-2026-002 limited-edition run with reinforced ferrules" with ProductNomen = "Sable OFC Paracord weave — vintage tonal profile", TerminationSpec = "Neutrik right-angle 3.5 mm TRS with gold-flash, sleeved ferrule and heat-shrink strain relief", and ShieldingArchitecture = "Helical foil over-braid combined with a tight copper braid and silicone-based vibration isolation"; and ItemIndex = "IDX-LT-2026-010 pre-production validation unit" with ProductNomen = "Zenith HybridCore — dual-gauge concentric conductors for extended treble clarity", TerminationSpec = "Custom discrete lug termination with solder-bushed contact treatment for low-resistance joint", and ShieldingArchitecture = "Pancake braid overlay design with segmented foil islands and embedded EMI-absorbing yarn"?
SQL Query: SELECT MIN(ConductorDiameter) AS ConductorDiameter FROM (SELECT ConductorDiameter AS ConductorDiameter FROM AudiophileInterconnects WHERE ItemIndex = "IDX-LT-2026-002 limited-edition run with reinforced ferrules" AND ProductNomen = "Arcade Studio Run — reinforced sleeve for touring rigs" AND TerminationSpec = "2-pin MMCX with micro-sleeve reinforcement and soldered litz tails" AND ShieldingArchitecture = "Sparse braid with low-mass foil liner optimized for ultra-low capacitance and controlled impedance" UNION ALL SELECT ConductorDiameter AS ConductorDiameter FROM AudiophileInterconnects WHERE ItemIndex = "IDX-LT-2026-002 limited-edition run with reinforced ferrules" AND ProductNomen = "Sable OFC Paracord weave — vintage tonal profile" AND TerminationSpec = "Neutrik right-angle 3.5 mm TRS with gold-flash, sleeved ferrule and heat-shrink strain relief" AND ShieldingArchitecture = "Helical foil over-braid combined with a tight copper braid and silicone-based vibration isolation" UNION ALL SELECT ConductorDiameter AS ConductorDiameter FROM AudiophileInterconnects WHERE ItemIndex = "IDX-LT-2026-010 pre-production validation unit" AND ProductNomen = "Zenith HybridCore — dual-gauge concentric conductors for extended treble clarity" AND TerminationSpec = "Custom discrete lug termination with solder-bushed contact treatment for low-resistance joint" AND ShieldingArchitecture = "Pancake braid overlay design with segmented foil islands and embedded EMI-absorbing yarn");
